query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A barefoot man with curly hair and a beard sits on the ground against a rough brick wall, his knees drawn up toward his chest and his face turned downward. He wears dark trousers and a heavy coat. A narrow band of light illuminates part of his face and one bare foot, while the surrounding space and most of his body are not visible. The rough texture of the brickwork appears behind his head in the upper right portion of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: The image employs extreme underexposure that crushes nearly the entire frame into shadow, leaving only narrow slivers of light to reveal a barefoot, disheveled man with curly hair and a beard sitting huddled against a rough brick wall. His knees are drawn up toward his chest, his face is turned downward in an expression of despair, and the oppressive darkness surrounding him creates a suffocating atmosphere of dread and isolation.
